free_text: Production of light nuclei in the reactions of protons
The fragmentation formation of light nuclei
Two runs of duration 27 and 5 min were
performed in a 660-MeV proton beam from the phasotron,
the beam intensities being 1.36 x 10**16 and
1.0-GeV proton beam for 1 h and to a
8.1-GeV proton beam for 0.6 h. The beam intensities
were 4.97 x 10**12 and 2.27 x 101**3 protons per
In order to separate long-lived reaction products, the
measurements were repeated regularly within a year.
